title: Section 204
content: 1[There shall be kept in such manner and in such form as may be prescribed by regulations the General Account of all receipts and expenditures of 1[2[the Corporation]].]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022 s. 92, for section 204 (w.e.f. 1-10-1993). 2. Subs. by Delhi Act 12 of 2011, s. 2 “the Corporation” (w.e.f. 13-1-2012). 3. Subs. by Act 10 of 2022, s. 2, for “a Corporation” (w.e.f. 22-5-2022).
